arts.ttl: ‘My future is here’ - Ferran Torres shoots down AC Milan rumors
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Ferran Torres shot down rumors he could move to AC Milan ahead of Tuesday’s Champions League tie with Benfica . However, Ferran told a press conference he’s only thinking of Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Flick explains why Szczesny is one of the ‘best signings’ Barça have made
arts.sum: Szczesny has certainly more than delivered on and off the pitch, and it’s very impressive how he was able to come out of retirement, wait months for a chance to play, and look like he never missed a beat as soon as he made his first start. Flick went as far as to call him one of the best signings the club has made in recent years, praising Szczesny’s leadership as he helps a young squad navigate the ups and downs of a long season.

arts.sum: Barcelona are back in action in the Champions League on Tuesday, traveling to Portugal to take on Benfica.
